Off Calendar Feb-24-2006 Continued To Apr-11-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Peter Henry Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dark Sirius Entertainment LLC. Plaintiff's witness, Valencia Burton, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Da Band Touring, Inc. DBA Da Bank Touring Company, Inc. DBA Da Band as follows:
Damages/Principal: $74,283.00
Prejudgment Interes:t $342.50
Costs: $342.50
for a total of $75,946.88
Counsel to prepare judgment.

PM
Judgment received and signed by Commissioner Sue Kaplan.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Peter Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dark Sirius Entertainment, LLC.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court ordered this matter off-calendar.
Matter is set for TRIAL on Nov. 7, 2005, as to the answered defendants. The three cause of actions all interwoven, counsel to prove-up at trial.
